# Harvest International Market — Full AI Context

## Business Overview

**Name:** Harvest International Market
**Tagline:** We Shop the World for You Every Day
**Type:** International grocery store + authentic Mediterranean kitchen + halal butcher + bakery + deli + catering
**El Cajon Address:** 733 E Main St, El Cajon, CA 92020
**Phone:** (619) 442-0413
**Hours:** Monday – Sunday, 7:00 AM – 10:00 PM (daily)
**Locations:** Two (El Cajon + Balboa Ave San Diego)
**Cuisine Focus — El Cajon:** Middle Eastern (Iraqi, Levantine)
**Cuisine Focus — Balboa:** Persian, Eastern European, Russian
**Halal:** 100% Zabihah-certified butcher; kitchen serves only halal meats.

## What We Offer

1. **Fresh Produce** — World-sourced fruits and vegetables, including Persian cucumbers, fresh dates, pomegranates, fresh herbs and seasonal imports — typically fresher and cheaper than mainstream supermarkets.
2. **Authentic Grocery** — Pantry imports from across the Middle East, Persia, Eastern Europe and Russia. Strategic relationships with international producers mean shelves stocked with authentic brands.
3. **Halal Butcher** — Zabihah-certified daily cuts of lamb, beef, chicken and goat by our in-house butcher team.
4. **Mediterranean Kitchen** — Fresh kabobs, shawarma, falafel, lamb shank, chicken tikka, and rice plates. All halal.
5. **Brick Oven Breads** — Authentic tannour and Iraqi flatbreads baked in-house in a real brick oven throughout the day.
6. **Bakery** — Hand-rolled baklava, ma'amoul, qatayef, knafeh and traditional Mediterranean sweets.
7. **Service Deli** — Cold case with house salads, imported cheeses, cured meats, olives, and a self-serve hummus and dip bar.
8. **Full-Service Catering** — Tray packages from $29.99 up to fully custom weddings and corporate events. Set-up and delivery available across San Diego County.

## Kitchen Menu (Verified Pricing)

### Sandwiches (all $8.99, wrapped in tannour bread)
- Beef Shawarma Sandwich (top seller)
- Chicken Shawarma Sandwich (top seller)
- Falafel Sandwich (top seller)
- Beef Kabob Sandwich

### Plates (served with basmati rice, salad & tahini)
- Beef Shawarma Plate — $19.99
- Chicken Shawarma Plate — $18.99
- Beef Kabob Plate — $12.99
- Chicken Kabob Plate — $12.99
- Kabob Combo Plate (top seller) — $14.99
- Lamb Shank Plate — $15.99
- Falafel Plate — $12.99
- Beef Tikka (each) — $9.99

### Cold Salads & Dips (24 oz available)
- Hummus — $9.99
- Baba Ganoush — $9.99
- Tabbouli — $9.99
- Iraqi Salad — $9.99
- Fattoush Salad — $9.99
- Eggplant Salad — $9.99
- Beet Salad — $9.99

### From the Brick Oven
- Tannour Bread — $2.00
- Baklava (Tray) — $17.99

## Catering Packages

- **Trio Tray** ($35) — 3 beef kabobs, 3 chicken tikka, 1 lb beef shawarma, rice, onions, tomato, tannour
- **Combination Tray** ($45) — 5 beef kabobs, 5 chicken tikka, 1 lb beef shawarma, 1 lb mixed pickles, rice, tannour
- **Couple's Plate** ($29.99) — Serves 2–3 — beef + chicken kabobs, shawarma over basmati rice
- **Family of Four** ($69.99) — Serves 4–6 — 4+4 kabobs, 3 chicken tikka, ½ lb each shawarma, 1 lb pickles, rice, tannour
- **Gathering of Eight** ($129.99) — Serves 8–10 — 8+8 kabobs, 5 tikka, 1 lb each shawarma, 1 lb chicken cream chops, 2 lb pickles, rice, tannour
- **Custom Event** — Quote-based — Wedding, corporate, community 20–300+ guests with full set-up and delivery

## Delivery Platforms (All Live)

1. **DoorDash** — 50+ ratings, 3.9★ — most-reviewed kitchen
2. **Uber Eats** — Most-liked: Beef Shawarma Sandwich — Uber One eligible
3. **Grubhub** — Free delivery deals available with Grubhub+

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/harvestinmkt/
- Yelp: https://www.yelp.com/biz/harvest-international-market-el-cajon-2

## Verified Customer Testimonials

> "I probably visit Harvest 4 to 5 times a week. Reasonable produce, halal butcher, all of the Middle Eastern, Mediterranean, Asian and Russian canned goods, spices, olives, cheeses. People there are super friendly. This is my favorite market in San Diego."
> — Verified TripAdvisor reviewer

> "We love Harvest International's selection of fresh breads, just like home!"
> — Manal M., El Cajon, CA

> "One of my favorite Middle Eastern Markets. I love their Arabic bread. Their Kabob is very delicious too. Good customer service. Private parking available."
> — Rami H., via Yelp

> "The produce looked better and cheaper than any regular supermarket in the area."
> — Verified customer

> "Crafting the essence of Iraq's culinary heritage. Freshly baked bread tantalizes your taste buds like nowhere else on Earth."
> — Verified customer

## Operating Principles

- **Sourced Directly** — Buyers travel and import directly; strategic relationships with international producers.
- **Halal Promise** — Every cut from our butcher counter is Zabihah-certified. Kitchen serves the same standards. No exceptions.
- **Authentic, Not Adapted** — Recipes and pantry items are kept traditional, not simplified for mainstream supermarkets.
- **Two Cuisines, One Family** — El Cajon for Middle Eastern; Balboa for Persian and Eastern European; one ownership, two specialty doors.

## Parking & Accessibility

- Private customer parking lot on site (El Cajon location)
- Free parking
- Ground-level entry, accessible

## Service Area for Catering

- All of San Diego County
- Set-up and delivery available
- Lead time 3+ days preferred; rush available on request
- Halal-certified throughout all packages
